name: ai_powered_job_board
description: Aura is a modern, premium, and feature-rich job board application built with a React/Vite/TypeScript frontend and an Express/TypeScript/Prisma/PostgreSQL backend. It is designed to bridge the gap between candidates and employers using state-of-the-art Local LLMs (via Ollama or LM-Studio) and external LLM services (OpenAI and Claude).
